last_assistant_message:
Done. Here is a summary of what was changed:

**Root `package.json`**
- `name`: `pi-monorepo` -> `dg-claw`
- `dependencies`: removed `@mariozechner/pi-coding-agent`, added `@dg-claw/coding-agent: "0.1.0"`

**`packages/ai/package.json`**
- `name`: `@mariozechner/pi-ai` -> `@dg-claw/ai`
- `version`: `0.63.1` -> `0.1.0`
- `description`: appended "for DG-Claw"
- `bin` key: `pi-ai` -> `dg-claw-ai`
- `repository.url`: badlogic/pi-mono -> forsonny/DG-Claw

**`packages/agent/package.json`**
- `name`: `@mariozechner/pi-agent-core` -> `@dg-claw/agent`
- `version`: `0.63.1` -> `0.1.0`
- `description`: appended "for DG-Claw"
- dependency `@mariozechner/pi-ai` -> `@dg-claw/ai: "0.1.0"`
- `repository.url`: updated

**`packages/tui/package.json`**
- `name`: `@mariozechner/pi-tui` -> `@dg-claw/tui`
- `version`: `0.63.1` -> `0.1.0`
- `description`: appended "for DG-Claw"
- `repository.url`: updated

**`packages/web-ui/package.json`**
- `name`: `@mariozechner/pi-web-ui` -> `@dg-claw/web-ui`
- `version`: `0.63.1` -> `0.1.0`
- `description`: updated to reference DG-Claw
- dependencies `@mariozechner/pi-ai` + `@mariozechner/pi-tui` -> `@dg-claw/ai` + `@dg-claw/tui`
- Added `repository` block (was missing in the original)

**`packages/coding-agent/package.json`**
- `name`: `@mariozechner/pi-coding-agent` -> `@dg-claw/coding-agent`
- `version`: `0.63.1` -> `0.1.0`
- `description`: updated to reference DG-Claw
- `piConfig` key renamed to `dgClawConfig`; `name: "pi"` -> `"dg-claw"`, `configDir: ".pi"` -> `".dg-claw"`
- `bin` key: `pi` -> `dg-claw`
- `build:binary` script: `dist/pi` -> `dist/dg-claw`
- dependencies `@mariozechner/pi-agent-core`, `@mariozechner/pi-ai`, `@mariozechner/pi-tui` renamed to `@dg-claw/agent`, `@dg-claw/ai`, `@dg-claw/tui`
- `@mariozechner/jiti` and `@mariozechner/clipboard` left untouched
- `repository.url`: updated

All 6 files validated as syntactically correct JSON before committing.
